description_long: This is a muscular humanoid figure with a bald head and prominent facial features, including a strong jawline and furrowed brow. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless armored vest with metallic gold accents and a high collar, paired with fitted pants and knee-high armored boots. Its skin is a distinct purple hue, and the right arm is bare while the left arm is covered by a large, metallic gauntlet adorned with several colored stones. The figure's left hand is raised and open, displaying the gauntlet prominently, while the right hand is relaxed at its side. The overall appearance is imposing and powerful, with a stance that suggests confidence and authority. The attire and accessories give the impression of a character from a science fiction or superhero universe.
description: A muscular, bald humanoid in armored attire with a prominent metallic gauntlet on its left hand, standing confidently. The figure features purple skin, gold-accented armor, and an imposing presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's facial features, armored vest, and the raised left hand with the metallic gauntlet clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the muscular arm, and the detailed gauntlet with colored stones.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the armored vest, the back of the head, and the open left hand with the gauntlet from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm, the side of the armored vest, and the profile of the boots and pants.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless armored vest with metallic accents, fitted pants, and knee-high armored boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with left hand raised
